3274340.name: Bountiful Hunters
3274340.description:
Throughout history, there has been a defining wall between good and evil. However, we often forget to include those who stand in between good and evil, the gray area. That's where bounty hunters come in. An evil known as "The Shroud" was long ago trapped in purgatory, but has been unexpectedly unleashed across time and bounty hunters from all points in time have been summoned by an unknown force to take it down, for a price of course.

Play through a story of evil and... somewhat less evil to take down the Shroud. Or, for more entertainment, you can fight by yourself or with friends to survive a gauntlet of enemies in many stages. Collect items to empower your character to take down enemies quicker. Play as multiple different characters with varying play styles.

Will these hunters be enough to stop this force of evil that threatens the fabric of the world? Or are they too selfish to care?

Story Mode

Follow the various bounty hunters in trying to stop this ancient evil freed from it's cage. Travel to all sorts of locations and fight the Shroud to save the timeline while completing certain objectives in each chapter. Each chapter also contains story cutscenes and lore to keep you at the edge of your seat. You will also be able to unlock a majority of characters and locales in this mode.

Freeplay

Play by yourself or with up to 4 friends trying to survive the longest. Defeat enemies and the occasional boss that will spawn to earn money and buy additional items for your arsenal. Be careful however, the longer you survive the higher the difficulty gets. Keep your guard up to stay alive!

The Arena

Challenge your friends to a fight to the death! Fight enemies in short bite sized battles to gain money to buy items, then get ready to fight your friends. Whoever survives and defeats everyone will emerge victorious!

Extras

Listen to music, read up on some lore, and more in a small extras section

Guest hunters?

Not only have hunters from different time periods joined the fight, there are guests from other dimensions who have arrived as well! Play as Jeremy from the strange labyrinthian world of Hypothetimania and Taria Takara from the shoot em up world of Atomanta along with more to come!

All caught up to speed? Great, now let's hunt some bounties!
